title: jasminum forstenii var. ensatum
intro: Jasminum forstenii var. ensatum, also known as the Himalayan jasmine, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Oleaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
